calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Yee Wah Lee, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Chi Wang Kwan and with Cantonese Interpreter William Guan.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Minor's father/Co-Petitioner Tong Yip Kwan, but consented and signed the Petition for name change of the Minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Nick Chi Wang Kwan.
Decree signed in open court.
